executives.name: Brandon Macdonald
executives.background: Mr. Macdonald is a professional geologist and the CEO of Fireweed Metals Corp. He has extensive experience in capital markets and mineral exploration.

executives.name: Graham Richardson
executives.background: Mr. Richardson is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 15 years of experience in finance and accounting. He was previously CFO of Nova Royalty Corp. and has held senior roles at Teck Resources and KPMG.

executives.name: Ian Gibbs
executives.background: Mr. Gibbs is a Canadian Chartered Professional Accountant with over 25 years of experience in the resource sector. He has served as CFO for several public companies.

executives.name: Paul Harbidge
executives.background: Mr. Harbidge has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry. He was previously President and CEO of GT Gold Corp. and Senior Vice President, Exploration at Goldcorp Inc. He also served as General Manager, Exploration at Randgold Resources.

board_of_directors.name: Brandon Macdonald
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Macdonald is a professional geologist and the CEO of Fireweed Metals Corp. He has extensive experience in capital markets and mineral exploration.

board_of_directors.name: Ian Gibbs
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Gibbs is a Canadian Chartered Professional Accountant with over 25 years of experience in the resource sector. He has served as CFO for several public companies.

board_of_directors.name: Paul Harbidge
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Harbidge has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry. He was previously President and CEO of GT Gold Corp. and Senior Vice President, Exploration at Goldcorp Inc. He also served as General Manager, Exploration at Randgold Resources.

board_of_directors.name: Ron Hochstein
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Hochstein is the Chair of the Board. He is currently the President and CEO of Lundin Gold Inc. and has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry.
